raw_consumer_statement: I have an Exxon Mobil personal credit card, since XXXX. I saw on my statement had many ( XXXX to XXXX or more ) small charges from XXXX locations that I assume maybe gas stations. In one day there were over 20 small charges under {$10.00} each at one location in XXXX. Next day over 20 small charges at a XXXX XXXX location. Exxon Mobil will not talk about it, they just send me to virtual locations for help. When I tell the computer what the problem is, it tells me they don't understand my words ( when I say, 'I need help with unauthorized charges ', they hang up. I sent them an email to cancel my card and they stopped my access to the my statements. I paid for many unauthorized charges to stop my bills. I need to get paid back for those charges.
